motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def findTheLongestSubstring(s: str) -> int:
    vowels = set('aeiou')
    max_length = 0
    for i in range(len(s)):
        count = s[i] in vowels
        if count and count % 2 == 0:
            max_length = max(max_length, i + 1 - count)
        else:
            max_length = max(max_length, i + 1)
    return max_length

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
